_description: The user sends a message to the bot requesting skill creation

text.text: <@U_BOT_ID> create a skill that tracks newsletter influence across social media platforms

_description: Bot posts initial thinking message. This message will be updated in-place via chat.update.
Bot updates the same message to show progress. Each status update uses chat.update on the original message ts.

_step: Step 3b: Bot Progress - Review Phase (chat.update replaces Step 3)
Step 4: Bot Result (chat.update replaces progress with final output)
_description: Final output replaces the progress message entirely. This is the completed skill creation result.

text.text:
*Description:* Tracks newsletter content mentions, shares, and discussions across Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Hacker News, and Reddit. Computes an influence score based on reach, engagement velocity, and sentiment.

*Tools Used:* WebSearch, WebFetch
*Composable With:* content-research, newsletter-analytics, performance-reports

*Generated SKILL.md Preview:*
```
---
name: influence-tracker
version: 1.0.0
description: Track newsletter influence across social platforms
tools:
  - WebSearch
  - WebFetch
input_schema:
  newsletter_name: string
  time_window: string
  platforms: string[]
output_schema:
  influence_score: number
  mentions: object[]
  sentiment: object
  top_amplifiers: object[]
---
```
